privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic accessibility evaluation task with 6 venues (Grand Ballroom, Tech Conference Center, Vintage Theater, Community Center, Arena Stadium, Learning Hub). The task requires standardizing messy venue data into Yes/No flags for accessibility features using text parsing. Key verified facts: 6 venues total, 300-second timeout, 20 max steps, medium difficulty, data intentionally inconsistent with varying description formats, minimum requirements need Level/Ramped Entry AND Accessible Restroom AND Hearing Support (all required via AND logic), companion ticket cost is $50 when required (used in cost calculations), total cost = parking + (companion if required × $50) + equipment rental. Data is entirely synthetic, created by setup script.
